---
title: "grafico_espectro"
author: "Samuel dos Santos Rodrigues"
format: html
editor: visual
---
```{r grafico, warning=FALSE}

# Criar os dados simulados:

espectro_fundo <- data.frame(x = seq(0, 10, length.out = 500))

# Construir o gráfico:

grafico_espectro <- ggplot() +
  geom_tile(data = espectro_fundo, aes(x = x, y = 0, fill = x), 
            width = 10/499, height = 1) +
  scale_fill_gradient(low = "#e5f5e0", high = "#005a32") + 
  # Marcadores (ticks):
  annotate("segment", x = c(0, 3.33, 6.66, 10), xend = c(0, 3.33, 6.66, 10), 
           y = -0.5, yend = -0.9, color = "grey50", linewidth = 0.5) +
  annotate("segment", x = 0, xend = 10, y = -0.9, yend = -0.9, 
           color = "grey50", linewidth = 0.5) +
  annotate("text", x = 1.66, y = -1.3, label = "BAIXA CAPACIDADE", 
           size = 3.5, fontface = "italic", color = "grey30") +
  annotate("text", x = 5.00, y = -1.3, label = "MÉDIA CAPACIDADE", 
           size = 3.5, fontface = "italic", color = "grey30") +
  annotate("text", x = 8.33, y = -1.3, label = "ALTA CAPACIDADE", 
           size = 3.5, fontface = "italic", color = "grey30") +
  # Linhas das Regionais:
  geom_segment(data = dadosBH_saude, 
               aes(x = iCEIS, xend = iCEIS, y = -0.5, yend = 1.1), 
               color = "grey20", 
               linewidth = 0.6) +
  geom_text(data = dadosBH_saude, 
            aes(x = iCEIS, y = 1.2, label = regional),
            angle = 90,              
            hjust = 0,               
            vjust = 0.5,        
            fontface = "bold",
            size = 2.8) + 
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0, 10), breaks = NULL) + 
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(-1.8, 5.0), breaks = NULL) +
  labs(
    x = NULL,
    y = NULL
  ) +
  theme_void() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16, hjust = 0.5, margin = margin(b = 5)),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 12, hjust = 0.5, color = "grey40", margin = margin(b = 20)),
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 11, face = "italic", color = "black", margin = margin(t = 15)),
    legend.position = "none"
  )

# Exibe o gráfico final:

print(grafico_espectro)

# Salvar:

ggsave(
  filename = "03. OUTPUTS/espectro_responsividade_iceis.png", 
  plot = grafico_espectro,
  width = 25,
  height = 14,
  units = "cm",
  dpi = 300,
  bg = "white"
)

```
